3132500.name: Bythzkel-Sombréa - Astec-Experimental
3132500.description:
The Astec experimental DLC is a sequel to the game Bythzkel Sombrea which takes place 20 years later in the events of soldier Bythzkel Astec is very different it does not present itself in the same way as that of the first it is almost shown with a VR view This game is independent since I designed it myself so you should outsmart the Mayans to avoid further infestation and free the prisoners who are in the areas and in the villages.

Gameplay and understanding of the game itself either you must play on the keyboard or VR Occulus to move the characters you control.

when you install the DLC completely it will ask you to confirm the game folder because I have integrated the tilesets and a rather special rendering you will have to accept without respite the folder indicated when starting the DLC.

Game on the multilingual and gameplay and french for english main menu translate text from french and english.

The game Bythzkel Sombréa and of Béta-Alpha no finish please report bug or one revification a developper.
3132500.supported_languages:
英语*, 法语
*具有完全音频支持的语言
